us_markets.note: AI infrastructure stocks correcting after May rally; rising yields putting pressure. Premarket: Nasdaq 100 -1%. Nvidia, Tesla, Meta lower.

treasury.note: Bear-steepening trend; 10Y near two-decade highs. Japan and China reducing US Treasury holdings.

crypto.note: Extreme fear sentiment. $814M liquidations on Monday.
